requirement_topic.en: Qatar Market Access — QGOSM / GSO Conformity and Registration, CRA Wireless Approval, and In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 卡塔尔市场准入——QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册、CRA无线核准及本地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 卡塔爾市場准入——QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記、CRA無線核准及本地進口商

summary.en: Non-Qatari manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Qatari market must address the following market-access obligations: (1) QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration — for products within QGOSM's regulated-product scope, conformity is assessed against the applicable GSO standards (including the GSO adoption of IEC 62133 for safety) and the product/consignment is registered through QGOSM (under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry); a conformity certificate / registration is generally required prior to customs clearance. (2) In-country importer — a foreign manufacturer cannot import directly; goods enter through a Qatar-established importer / commercial agent who is the responsible party for the consignment and for presenting conformity documentation to QGOSM and customs at Hamad Port. (3) CRA type approval — where the power bank has any wireless function, separate Communications Regulatory Authority approval is mandatory (see EMC/wireless row). (4) Energy-efficiency labelling — QS/GSO energy-efficiency labelling applies to listed product families; lithium batteries / power banks are generally outside that scheme, but exporters should confirm scope. Documentation (test reports, conformity certificate, importer details, transport docs) is presented at import.
summary.zh: 非卡塔尔制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放卡塔尔市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册——对于落入QGOSM受监管产品范围的产品，依据适用GSO标准（含GSO对IEC 62133安全的采纳）评定合格，并通过QGOSM（隶属商业与工业部）对产品/货批进行注册；通常须在清关前取得合格证书/注册。（2）本地进口商——外国制造商不可直接进口；货物须经在卡塔尔设立的进口商/商业代理进入，其为货批责任方，负责向QGOSM及哈马德港海关提交合格文件。（3）CRA型号核准——若移动电源含任何无线功能，须另行取得通信监管局核准（见EMC/无线行）。（4）能效标签——QS/GSO能效标签适用于列明产品族；锂电池/移动电源一般不在该体系内，但出口商应确认范围。文件（测试报告、合格证书、进口商信息、运输文件）于进口时提交。
summary.zht: 非卡塔爾製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放卡塔爾市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記——對於落入QGOSM受監管產品範圍的產品，依據適用GSO標準（含GSO對IEC 62133安全的採納）評定合格，並通過QGOSM（隸屬商業與工業部）對產品/貨批進行登記；通常須在清關前取得合格證書/登記。（2）本地進口商——外國製造商不可直接進口；貨物須經在卡塔爾設立的進口商/商業代理進入，其為貨批責任方，負責向QGOSM及哈馬德港海關提交合格文件。（3）CRA型號核准——若行動電源含任何無線功能，須另行取得通信監管局核准（見EMC/無線行）。（4）能效標籤——QS/GSO能效標籤適用於列明產品族；鋰電池/行動電源一般不在該體系內，但出口商應確認範圍。文件（測試報告、合格證書、進口商信息、運輸文件）於進口時提交。

standards_or_laws: QGOSM conformity assessment and product/consignment registration framework — Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, Ministry of Commerce and Industry
GSO standards (including GSO IEC 62133-2 for lithium battery safety) — applied by QGOSM
CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority of Qatar) type approval — for wireless functions
Qatar import / commercial-agency rules — goods enter via an in-country importer of record; customs clearance at Hamad Port

summary.en: China's domestic market access uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g. mobile-phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is NOT recognised by Qatar; it does not substitute for QGOSM/GSO conformity. For domestic Chinese sales a manufacturer does not need a Qatari importer or a CRA approval. There is no Chinese-export equivalent of the Qatari in-country importer-of-record obligation, the QGOSM consignment-registration step, or CRA radio type approval — these are Gulf market-access requirements that arise only on export to Qatar.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC属中国国内要求，不被卡塔尔认可，不可替代QGOSM/GSO合格评定。在国内销售时，制造商无需卡塔尔进口商或CRA核准。中国出口侧不存在等同于卡塔尔本地进口商责任方义务、QGOSM货批注册环节或CRA无线型号核准的制度——这些是仅在出口卡塔尔时产生的海湾市场准入要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC屬中國國內要求，不被卡塔爾認可，不可替代QGOSM/GSO合格評定。在國內銷售時，製造商無需卡塔爾進口商或CRA核准。中國出口側不存在等同於卡塔爾本地進口商責任方義務、QGOSM貨批登記環節或CRA無線型號核准的制度——這些是僅在出口卡塔爾時產生的海灣市場准入要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Qatar
PRC customs import/export declaration rules — domestic export documentation, not a foreign market-access conformity scheme

gap.en: Chinese exporters of portable batteries to Qatar face market-access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration — for in-scope products, a conformity certificate / consignment registration against GSO standards is generally required before customs clearance, replacing self-declaration; (2) in-country importer of record — goods must enter through a Qatar-established importer / commercial agent, so the exporter must appoint or work through one before shipping to Hamad Port; (3) CRA type approval for any wireless variant — a separate mandatory radio step; (4) confirming whether QS/GSO energy-efficiency labelling captures the specific product family. CCC certification does not transfer to any of these. The exporter must assemble a Qatar-facing package: GSO/IEC 62133 safety report, GSO EMC evidence, CRA approval where applicable, importer details, and UN 38.3 transport documentation, all presented at import.
gap.zh: 向卡塔尔出口便携式电池的中国出口商面临无中国国内对应的市场准入差距：（1）QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册——对受监管产品，通常须在清关前取得依据GSO标准的合格证书/货批注册，取代自我声明；（2）本地进口商责任方——货物须经在卡塔尔设立的进口商/商业代理进入，故出口商在向哈马德港出货前须任命或借助进口商；（3）任何无线型号的CRA型号核准——独立的强制无线环节；（4）确认QS/GSO能效标签是否涵盖该具体产品族。CCC认证不可转移至上述任何一项。出口商须组建面向卡塔尔的资料包：GSO/IEC 62133安全报告、GSO EMC证据、适用时的CRA核准、进口商信息及UN 38.3运输文件，于进口时一并提交。
gap.zht: 向卡塔爾出口便攜式電池的中國出口商面臨無中國國內對應的市場准入差距：（1）QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記——對受監管產品，通常須在清關前取得依據GSO標準的合格證書/貨批登記，取代自我聲明；（2）本地進口商責任方——貨物須經在卡塔爾設立的進口商/商業代理進入，故出口商在向哈馬德港出貨前須任命或借助進口商；（3）任何無線型號的CRA型號核准——獨立的強制無線環節；（4）確認QS/GSO能效標籤是否涵蓋該具體產品族。CCC認證不可轉移至上述任何一項。出口商須組建面向卡塔爾的資料包：GSO/IEC 62133安全報告、GSO EMC證據、適用時的CRA核准、進口商信息及UN 38.3運輸文件，於進口時一併提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration required before customs clearance for regulated products; in-country importer of record mandatory for import; CRA type approval mandatory for wireless variants; QS/GSO energy-efficiency labelling applies only to listed product families
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of a Qatari in-country importer, QGOSM consignment registration, or CRA radio approval required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM), Ministry of Commerce and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address Qatari market access before entry: QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration for in-scope products (generally pre-clearance), shipment through an in-country Qatari importer of record into Hamad Port, CRA type approval for any wireless variant, and a check of whether QS/GSO energy-efficiency labelling applies. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Qatari requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入卡塔尔市场前，须应对市场准入：对受监管产品取得QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册（通常须在清关前）、经卡塔尔本地进口商责任方将货物运入哈马德港、对任何无线型号取得CRA型号核准，并核实QS/GSO能效标签是否适用。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何卡塔尔要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入卡塔爾市場前，須應對市場准入：對受監管產品取得QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記（通常須在清關前）、經卡塔爾本地進口商責任方將貨物運入哈馬德港、對任何無線型號取得CRA型號核准，並核實QS/GSO能效標籤是否適用。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何卡塔爾要求。
